creator: ernst@heinz.jollem.com
text:
Some suggestions:

* Name this port linux-ibm-jdk13 because IBM has 1.1 and 1.2 JDK's too.
* Tell the user to download the distfile from 
http://www6.software.ibm.com/dl/dklx130/dklx130-p, that's a direct link to 
the download page.

I wonder if this JDK actually works under FreeBSD 4.x. I'm installing it on a 
fresh FreeBSD 4.3-RELEASE box as we speak.
